# META

<!-- Auto-managed by knowledge-base skills. Do not edit manually. -->

```
schema_version:  1
generated:       2026-05-23
last_synced:     2026-05-23
last_commit:     79b897d
docs_tree_hash:  untracked
```

---

## Fields

- `schema_version` → integer; increment when KB directory structure changes
- `generated` → ISO date when KB was first initialized
- `last_synced` → ISO date of most recent skill write operation
- `last_commit` → short commit SHA at sync time
- `docs_tree_hash` → git tree object hash for `./docs/`, or `untracked` before commit
